{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Yerin's belt
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin's belt]] is a bloody rope that behaves like a serpent.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
